selected.title: MCP target discovery and availability snapshot
selected.decision_if_pass: Permit compute-routed jobs and full budget scheduling when available.
selected.decision_if_fail: Force LOCAL_ONLY mode and constrain exploration budget to safe defaults.

selected.title: OpenClaw optimization and storage health check
selected.decision_if_pass: Keep autonomous loop enabled and proceed to regression/science execution.
selected.decision_if_fail: Stop long campaigns and remediate memory/compaction/governance setup first.

selected.title: OpenClaw optimization fallback thresholds check
selected.decision_if_pass: Classify platform as conditionally usable and prioritize remediation of strict-threshold gaps.
selected.decision_if_fail: Classify platform readiness as rejected and halt autonomous expansion.

stop_condition.note: Time remained while only Tier C work was queued. Budget reallocated to Tier A hardening tasks.
